interventions.name: C2 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: trace tables that record values and branch choices line by line

interventions.name: C2 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: test-purpose prompts that require naming what a chosen input is supposed to check

interventions.name: C2 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: bug-location-before-fix routines that separate diagnosis from repair

interventions.name: C2 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: after-the-fix checks comparing expected and actual behavior explicitly
